data.title: Samsung and Glance launch AI shopping tool
data.description: The launch is supported by a $200 million investment from Glance, which is leveraging Google’s Gemini AI and Imagen image-generation technology to power its recommendations and visuals.

data.title: Agentic AI's role in Walmart's future
data.description: Walmart's chief technology officer noted multiple agentic AI use cases in merchant tasks and customer service.

data.title: Target leans into third-party online marketplace growth
data.description: The push-to-scale Target Plus mirrors broader trends across the industry, as retailers like Walmart and Amazon grow their own marketplaces to diversify offerings.

data.title: AppDirect acquires Broker Online Exchange and expands into energy
data.description: “Businesses increasingly need both digital services and the energy to support them,” said Nicolas Desmarais, chairman and CEO of AppDirect. “Adding energy to our platform is part of meeting those needs.”

data.title: Ecommerce earnings recap: What you missed from Macy's, Gap and more
data.description: Abercrombie and American Eagle shared anticipated tariff-related costs as retailers announced new ecommerce and earnings results.
